/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o -o main  ../source/sh_prop/libsh_prop.a ../source/config/libconfig.a ../source/postproc/libpostproc.a ../source/utils/libutils.a ../source/io/libio.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.8.0 ../source/postproc/libpostproc.a ../source/io/libio.a ../source/config/libconfig.a ../source/utils/libutils.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/14/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
